characters.name: Chloe Martin
characters.description: Chloe Martin is a guest character onHot in Cleveland, portrayed byHeather Locklear. A former Miss Ohio and the ex‑wife ofAlec, Chloe remains closely tied to him through their shared business ventures. Confident, glamorous, and skilled at public relations, she hiresMelanieto help promote Cleveland, setting off a mix of professional tension and romantic complications within the group. Chloe Martinenters the story as a polished and assertive PR professional whose job is to “spin” Cleveland in the best possible light. Despite her poised exterior, she brings emotional complexity to the episode through her lingering connection toAlec— her ex‑husband and current business partner. Chloe’s presence creates a subtle love‑triangle dynamic, asAlecis pining forMelaniewhileMelanieis quietly pining for him, leaving Chloe caught in the middle without being fully aware of the situation. Heather Lockleardescribed Chloe as “a little similar toAmanda” (a nod to herMelrose Placecharacter) — not overly sweet, fiercely protective, and capable of sharp humor. Her beauty and confidence unsettle the group, but her interactions withMelaniereveal a character who is both competitive and unexpectedly vulnerable. Though she appears in only three episodes, Chloe leaves a memorable impression through her charisma, comedic timing, and the tension she brings toMelanieandAlec’sdeveloping relationship.
